results.name: bplist_ascii_string_roundtrip
results.ownership_note: Binary create/read in immutable mode must preserve an ASCII root string and report binary format.

results.name: bplist_unicode_string_roundtrip
results.ownership_note: Binary create/read in immutable mode must preserve a non-ASCII root string and use the UTF-16 string path for the tested case.

results.name: bplist_mixed_array_roundtrip
results.ownership_note: Binary create/read in immutable mode must preserve the supported mixed scalar array surface.

results.name: bplist_string_key_dictionary_roundtrip
results.ownership_note: Binary create/read in immutable mode must preserve the supported string-key dictionary surface.

results.name: bplist_non_string_dictionary_key_write_rejected
results.ownership_note: Binary-plist writing must reject dictionaries with non-string keys safely.

results.name: bplist_invalid_header_rejected
results.ownership_note: Binary-plist reading must reject an invalid header safely.

results.name: bplist_truncated_trailer_rejected
results.ownership_note: Binary-plist reading must reject truncated trailer data safely.
